full_text:
Peng Shi 彭式
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Peng Shi (彭式)was born in Qiangtang county in Wu. A member of a powerful local family, plundered the area. Executed by Zhou Fang. Peng Shi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
